team_name: TrustBid AI: A Sovereign, Explainable Decision Support Platform for Automated Government Tender Evaluation
summary: Design a technical platform that automates the evaluation of tender documents and bidder submissions, produces explainable evaluation reports, and addresses procurement governance failure in government procurement agencies.
optimization_claims: Silent disqualification is structurally impossible due to low confidence always escalating.
Explainability is enforced at the criterion level through source-linked extraction.
